package.title: Munnar Kochi Family — Hill Station & Heritage Escape

highlights.text: Three immersive nights in Munnar amid rolling tea estates and misty peaks
Eravikulam National Park, Lock Heart Gap, and Pothamedu panoramic viewpoints
Offbeat Blossom Hydel Park and exclusive family campfire evening
Fort Kochi heritage — Chinese Fishing Nets, Jew Town & Dutch Palace
Private Innova Crysta with TRAGUIN 24/7 family concierge
Handpicked premium resorts in Munnar and heritage Kochi

itinerary.title: Munnar Kochi Family — Hill Station & Heritage Escape
itinerary.tagline: Tea Hills & Colonial Charm — Munnar Meets Kochi
itinerary.overview: Connect the historical coastal city of Kochi with the mist-laden peaks of Munnar on TRAGUIN's premium family getaway — three nights amid emerald tea estates, offbeat valley explorations, and a heritage Fort Kochi finale with seamless private luxury transit.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-003 | Munnar Kochi Family | TRAGUIN Premium Kerala Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 04 Nights / 05 Days Kerala family package (KL-003) covering Munnar tea hills, Lock Heart Gap, Eravikulam, and Fort Kochi heritage with premium stays.

days.title: Kochi to Munnar — Misty Hills Welcome
days.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport where your TRAGUIN representative welcomes you. Commence a scenic drive toward Munnar through the Western Ghats, pausing at Cheeyappara and Valara Waterfalls and spice villages before checking into your handpicked luxury resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara Waterfalls, Spice Plantation viewpoints
Evening Experience: Leisurely resort walk, high tea overlooking valleys, and traditional welcome dinner
Optional Activities: Traditional Ayurvedic rejuvenation massage at the resort spa
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium / Luxury Resort)

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing — Tea Empire
days.description: Dedicated to comprehensive Munnar sightseeing — Eravikulam National Park (Rajamalai), Tata Tea Museum with tea tasting, Mattupetty Dam speed-boat cruise, Echo Point, and Kundala Lake surrounded by pine trees.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Eravikulam National Park, Tata Tea Museum, Mattupetty Dam, Eco Point, Kundala Lake
Evening Experience: Strolling through old Munnar town market, sampling fresh local banana fritters
Optional Activities: Speed boating at Mattupetty; professional family photoshoot amidst tea gardens
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium / Luxury Resort)

days.title: Munnar Offbeat — Hidden Valleys
days.description: Explore Lock Heart Gap for sweeping valley views, Blossom Hydel Park with flower gardens, Pothamedu Viewpoint over tea and cardamom plantations, and interactive tea estate walks with local workers.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lock Heart Gap, Blossom Hydel Park, Pothamedu Viewpoint, Tea Estate interactive walks
Evening Experience: Exclusive family campfire with live acoustic music or traditional storytelling
Optional Activities: Jeep safari to Kolukkumalai — the world's highest tea estate for sunset views
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium / Luxury Resort)

days.title: Munnar to Kochi — Colonial Heritage
days.description: Relish your final Munnar breakfast before descending to Kochi. Explore Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue in Jew Town, and Mattancherry Dutch Palace murals.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Fort Kochi Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Dutch Palace
Evening Experience: Sunset harbor cruise observing shipping channels, followed by gourmet dinner
Optional Activities: Authentic evening Kathakali classical dance performance
Overnight Stay: Kochi (Premium Business / Heritage Luxury Hotel)

days.title: Kochi Departure
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast and premium souvenir shopping for organic spices, tea blends, cashew nuts, and Kerala handloom attire before your seamless transfer to Cochin International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jew Town shopping walk, Lulu Mall visit (optional based on flight timing)
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance and seamless airport check-in coordination
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Breakfast

hotels.name: Taj Malabar Heritage / Grand Hyatt Presidential / Similar

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
04 nights premium accommodation — 03 nights Munnar and 01 night Kochi
Private high-tea at an exclusive scenic Munnar viewpoint
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
